betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Isotope Separator§f:
The Isotope Separator (nuclearcraft:separator) is a single-block machine that splits mixed-isotope ingots into enriched and depleted streams. It is the gateway between raw mining and nuclear fuel production.

§6Slot Layout (SeparatorRecipes.java:10)§f:
1 item input → 0 fluid input → 2 item outputs → 0 fluid output. The Separator takes one mixed-ingot stack and produces two separate isotope streams per cycle.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:70)§f:
Pattern "PMP / RCR / PMP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateBasic, M = motor, R = dustRedstone, C = chassis. Yields 1 Isotope Separator.

§6What It Makes (SeparatorRecipes.java:18-44)§f:
The Separator handles four families of isotope separation:
- Uranium (line 19): for type in {plain, Carbide, Oxide, Nitride, ZA}, 10× ingot/dustUranium{type} -> 9× ingotUranium238{type} + 1× ingotUranium235{type}, 5× speed.
- Boron (line 22): 12× ingot/dustBoron -> 9× ingotBoron11 + 3× ingotBoron10, 6× speed.
- Lithium (line 23): 10× ingot/dustLithium -> 9× ingotLithium7 + 1× ingotLithium6, 5× speed.
- Mixed fission fuels (line 25-29): 9× ingotLE/HE{Fuel}{fissile}{type} -> 8/6× fertile + 1/3× fissile, all type variants.

§6Full Fuel Family Coverage (SeparatorRecipes.java:30-32)§f:
addFuelSeparationRecipes() generates recipes for U (238, 233/235), Np (237, 236), Pu (242, 239/241), Am (243, 242), Cm (246, 243/245/247), Bk (247, 248), Cf (252, 249/251). Each fissile isotope of each element gets a parallel recipe in plain, Oxide, and Nitride fuel forms.

§6Fission Alloy Production (SeparatorRecipes.java:34-39)§f:
addFissionAlloyRecipes() generates two recipes per element in FISSION_ORE_DICT: {element} + dustZirconium -> {element}ZA, and {element} + dustGraphite -> {element}Carbide. This makes the Separator a one-stop shop for fabricating fuel cladding.

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The quest's task item is Uranium-235 (nuclearcraft:uranium:5), the most-cited separator output. Other graph descendants of the separator recipe family include LEU-235, HEU-235, Uranium-235-Zirconium Alloy, Uranium-235 Carbide, and the rad_shielding chain.

§6Upstream Materials§f:
The Separator consumes mixed ingots. Uranium comes from mining or from the Manufactory chain, Boron from Borax processing, and Lithium from Spodumene. The downstream Isotope Separator output streams are the inputs to Fission Fuel crafting.

§eTip§f: Build a row of Isotope Separators with speed upgrades to scale your LEU/HEU production. One batch of 10 raw uranium yields 9 depleted + 1 enriched — for larger batches of HEU, you'll need the Fuel Reprocessor to recycle depleted fuel back through the chain.

§eTip§f: Use the Separator in combination with the Manufactory and Ingot Former to produce fuel-specific forms (Carbide, Oxide, Nitride, ZA) for the Solid Fission Reactor.

§cWarning§f: The Separator outputs are radioactive. Don't carry stacks of U-235 or Pu-239 in your inventory without proper PPE — store them in shielded chests.
